creator: rakuco@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 178050
Proposed patch

The attached patch makes `make configure' work in security/pinentry-qt5 when grep(1) is built with the WITHOUT_GNU_GREP_COMPAT switch.

It has been sent upstream here: https://lists.gnupg.org/pipermail/gnupg-devel/2016-December/032351.html
